easy-does-it.opentdb.d0c625e67ff72cb0.prompt: What is the name of the cowboy toy in the Toy Story films?
easy-does-it.opentdb.d0c625e67ff72cb0.explanation: Woody is the cowboy toy at the center of the Toy Story films.
easy-does-it.opentdb.d0c625e67ff72cb0.details: Tom Hanks voices Sheriff Woody, who begins the series as Andy's favorite toy and the leader of the bedroom's toys.

easy-does-it.opentdb.156aeec902055d73.prompt: How many players does each soccer team normally have on the field at the start of a match?
easy-does-it.opentdb.156aeec902055d73.explanation: A soccer team normally fields 11 players, including its goalkeeper.
easy-does-it.opentdb.156aeec902055d73.details: Teams may name substitutes, but only eleven players per side can be on the field at once under the standard Laws of the Game.

easy-does-it.opentdb.c208bd4a3fd41826.prompt: What is the largest living land animal?
easy-does-it.opentdb.c208bd4a3fd41826.explanation: The African elephant is the largest living land animal.
easy-does-it.opentdb.c208bd4a3fd41826.details: The African bush elephant is the largest elephant species; exceptionally large males can weigh more than six metric tons.

easy-does-it.opentdb.0773d22d29701c69.prompt: The Nike apparel and footwear brand takes its name from the Greek goddess of what?

easy-does-it.opentdb.7cb14e3723da4947.prompt: Which planet is commonly called the Red Planet?
easy-does-it.opentdb.7cb14e3723da4947.explanation: Mars is commonly called the Red Planet.
easy-does-it.opentdb.7cb14e3723da4947.details: Iron minerals in Martian rocks and dust oxidize, or rust, giving much of the planet's surface its reddish color.

easy-does-it.opentdb.9bf9f8ba7aa2f6b5.prompt: What is a young frog called after it hatches from an egg?
easy-does-it.opentdb.9bf9f8ba7aa2f6b5.explanation: A young frog in its aquatic larval stage is called a tadpole.
easy-does-it.opentdb.9bf9f8ba7aa2f6b5.details: During metamorphosis, a tadpole develops legs, absorbs its tail, and changes from breathing mainly with gills to using lungs.

easy-does-it.opentdb.7d180f804ef859cb.prompt: How many days are in a leap year?
easy-does-it.opentdb.7d180f804ef859cb.details: The extra day is February 29. It keeps the calendar aligned with Earth's orbit, which takes slightly more than 365 days.

easy-does-it.opentdb.75d8133b4c9ae5ff.prompt: What color is made by mixing blue and yellow paint?
easy-does-it.opentdb.75d8133b4c9ae5ff.explanation: Mixing blue and yellow pigments produces green.
easy-does-it.opentdb.75d8133b4c9ae5ff.details: This is subtractive color mixing, used with paint and ink. Mixing colored light follows different additive-color rules.

easy-does-it.opentdb.18eb986bb73d8c7a.prompt: Which sport is played at the Wimbledon Championships?
easy-does-it.opentdb.18eb986bb73d8c7a.explanation: Wimbledon is one of tennis's four Grand Slam tournaments.
easy-does-it.opentdb.18eb986bb73d8c7a.details: It is played on grass courts at the All England Club in London and is the oldest of the four Grand Slam events.

easy-does-it.opentdb.ff8f9066877d3fdb.prompt: How many points is a successful free throw worth in basketball?
easy-does-it.opentdb.ff8f9066877d3fdb.explanation: A successful basketball free throw is worth one point.
easy-does-it.opentdb.ff8f9066877d3fdb.details: Free throws are uncontested shots taken from the foul line, usually awarded after certain personal or technical fouls.

easy-does-it.opentdb.a0d87d8f291c7710.prompt: Who played Jack Dawson in the film Titanic?
easy-does-it.opentdb.a0d87d8f291c7710.explanation: Leonardo DiCaprio played Jack Dawson in Titanic.
easy-does-it.opentdb.a0d87d8f291c7710.details: Jack is the young artist who falls in love with Rose, played by Kate Winslet, during the doomed ship's maiden voyage.

easy-does-it.opentdb.5e7163fbe5bb3855.prompt: In which country are the pyramids of Giza?
easy-does-it.opentdb.5e7163fbe5bb3855.explanation: The pyramids of Giza are in Egypt, just outside modern Cairo.
easy-does-it.opentdb.5e7163fbe5bb3855.details: The complex includes the Great Pyramid built for Pharaoh Khufu, the only surviving Wonder of the Ancient World.

easy-does-it.opentdb.ce252b3ea1bfc2f9.prompt: What is the largest ocean on Earth?
easy-does-it.opentdb.ce252b3ea1bfc2f9.explanation: The Pacific Ocean is the largest ocean on Earth.
easy-does-it.opentdb.ce252b3ea1bfc2f9.details: It covers more area than all Earth's land combined and stretches between Asia and Australia in the west and the Americas in the east.

easy-does-it.opentdb.8cf71644fa8b5973.prompt: Which blood component gathers to form a plug at the site of an injury?

easy-does-it.opentdb.de708c7c0f4f5a20.prompt: Which sport uses a racket to hit a shuttlecock over a net?
easy-does-it.opentdb.de708c7c0f4f5a20.explanation: Badminton uses rackets to send a shuttlecock over a net.
easy-does-it.opentdb.de708c7c0f4f5a20.details: Unlike a ball, the feathered or synthetic shuttlecock slows sharply in flight; badminton can be played as singles or doubles.

easy-does-it.opentdb.f164cbc8b878f45a.prompt: Which Stranger Things character has telekinetic powers?

easy-does-it.opentdb.f3e3740813e63d27.prompt: Which actor plays Iron Man in the Marvel Cinematic Universe?
easy-does-it.opentdb.f3e3740813e63d27.explanation: Robert Downey Jr. plays Tony Stark, also known as Iron Man, in the Marvel Cinematic Universe.
easy-does-it.opentdb.f3e3740813e63d27.details: He debuted in 2008's Iron Man, the film that launched the interconnected Marvel Cinematic Universe.

easy-does-it.opentdb.5a0194fbb8fae3be.prompt: How many rings are on the Olympic symbol?
easy-does-it.opentdb.5a0194fbb8fae3be.explanation: The Olympic symbol consists of five interlocking rings.
easy-does-it.opentdb.5a0194fbb8fae3be.details: The blue, yellow, black, green, and red rings represent the union of the world's inhabited continents through sport.
